steps.title: Count the exposed faces
steps.content: The box has square sides and no lid, so its exterior surface area includes $5$ square faces.

steps.title: Find square centimeters
steps.content:
Each face has side length $86$ centimeters, so the total exposed area is
$$
5(86^2)=5(7{,}396)=36{,}980\ \text{cm}^2
$$
